titles.title: Jesus Is a Rock in a Weary Land

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus is a rock in a weary land, a weary land, a weary land; My Jesus is a rock in a weary land, a shelter in the time of storm.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: No man can do like Jesus, Not a mumbling word He said; He went walking down to Lazarus’ grave, And He raised him from the dead.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When Jesus was on earth, The flesh was very weak; He girdled himself with a tow'l, And washed his disciples feet.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yonder comes my Savior, Him whom I love so well; He has the palm of victory, And the keys of death and Hell.
